hero_subtitle: SFTY structures onboarding and ongoing review to align KYC and KYB processes with VARA regulatory expectations while preserving audit-ready evidence and policy traceability.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays when KYC and KYB checks remain disconnected from VARA-specific onboarding requirements. This fragmentation makes audit evidence harder to trace and regulatory reviews more manual and inconsistent.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB provider outputs with VARA onboarding rules, case management and audit evidence to streamline review and support consistent compliance decisions.
workflow_title: From KYC and KYB checks to approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB provider results through risk-based review, case management, decision logging and audit evidence for VARA compliance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYC and KYB. Clear VARA compliance control

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs orchestrating jurisdiction-specific KYC and KYB, providing audit-ready evidence and governance required for secure onboarding and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VARA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VARA compliance teams with a structured operational layer that connects KYC and KYB checks into auditable workflows tailored to VARA regulatory requirements and onboarding standards.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VARA KYC and KYB workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates KYC and KYB provider outputs applying VARA-specific policies, routing cases for review, tracking decisions and automating evidence collection to support a consistent onboarding process.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve VARA onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to create an audit-ready record that meets VARA’s compliance and supervisory expectations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC and KYB providers to connect their results into a controlled workflow without disrupting current systems or providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace VARA compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but integrates their data into a cohesive compliance control layer supporting VARA requirements.
final_title: Structure VARA onboarding and review workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY aligns KYC and KYB outputs with VARA rules, preserving audit-ready evidence and supporting jurisdictional compliance controls.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
